signIn.title: Synamail
signIn.subtitle: Connect Synamail to your Synaplan workspace.
signIn.invalidUrl: That doesn't look like a valid URL. Include https:// — e.g. https://web.synaplan.com
signIn.httpsRequired: Outlook requires an HTTPS address for sign-in. A plain http:// URL (including http://localhost) won't work — run the local HTTPS bridge and use https://localhost:5174 instead.
signIn.localDevHint: Developers: point Synamail at a local instance over HTTPS, e.g. https://localhost:5174 (run 'make bridge'). Click Save so the value persists and isn't lost when you change something.

home.title: Home
home.intro: Chat with Synaplan, add your mail to your knowledge base, or draft a new email — no message selection needed.

commands.searchSub: Find messages about a topic and add them to your knowledge base
commands.newMailSub: Describe it and let AI draft the email

chat.emptyHint: Start a conversation — ask a question or paste some text.

search.title: Filter emails for knowledge base
search.permissionNeeded: Mailbox search needs a one-time permission update. Remove and re-add the Synamail add-in to grant mailbox access (knowledge-base results still work).

newMail.title: New email
newMail.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Ask the supplier to confirm the May delivery date and CC accounting.
newMail.unsupportedHost: This Outlook host can't open a new message window from an add-in.
newMail.opened: Draft opened in a new Outlook window.

read.title: Email actions

meeting.title: Suggested meeting times
meeting.none: No meeting times were proposed in this email.
meeting.unsupported: This Outlook host can't open a new appointment form.
meeting.badDate: Couldn't read that time. Try another slot.

read.askImageHint: {n} image(s) from this email will be sent to Synaplan with your question.

blockDialog.title: Block this sender?
blockDialog.body: Future messages from {email} will be moved to Junk and Synamail will skip them.
blockDialog.alsoClean: Also move existing messages from this sender to Junk
blockDialog.undoHint: You can undo this any time in Outlook → Rules.
blockDialog.successServer: Rule created. {moved} existing messages moved to Junk.
blockDialog.successMock: Rule created (dev mock) for {email}. The real rule lands in Sprint 4.

compose.title: Compose mode
compose.intentPlaceholder: Describe what you want to write…
compose.ragNoResults: No matching snippets in your knowledge base.

contactKb.noContact: Open an email to pick a contact.
contactKb.noResults: Nothing saved for this contact yet.

rules.intro: Manage the topics Synaplan uses to route and answer your messages. Tier-0 keyword rules win immediately over AI classification.
rules.testNoEmail: Open an email first to test routing.
rules.keywordsHint: Comma-separated keywords that route to this topic
rules.readonly: System topic — read-only. Create a custom topic in Synaplan to edit its rules.

mailRoutes.title: Mail Routes
mailRoutes.intro: Automations that run AI actions on incoming mail from specific senders — like Outlook rules, but powered by Synaplan.
mailRoutes.pausedOn: Paused — no route runs until you resume.
mailRoutes.pausedOff: Active — routes run on matching mail.
mailRoutes.empty: No routes yet. Add one below.
mailRoutes.addHint: Pick the kind of automation to create.

summary.meeting: Checks the calendar; suggests confirming with a {mins}-min invite.

fields.name: Name
fields.workingLanguageHint: Content is translated to this language before adding; the original is kept so search reveals the source language.

validation.nameAndSenders: Give the route a name and at least one sender.
validation.group: Enter a project / knowledge base folder.

settings.title: Settings
settings.instanceHint: Edit before signing in to use a self-hosted server.

common.mockMode: Mock mode — Sprint 3 wires this to web.synaplan.com
